style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration, amber-yellow accented, of a careful editor passing over a page of text, circling a few tell-tale phrases and writing a cleaner, plainer line in the margin. A sense of prose being made to sound human again. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear amber-yellow accent, archival print quality, no text. Write the most cliche em dash filled AI cliche and show someone crossing this stuff off with a red pen.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial illustration, amber-yellow accented, of a careful editor passing over a page of text, circling a few tell-tale phrases and writing a cleaner, plainer line in the margin. A sense of prose being made to sound human again. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear amber-yellow accent, archival print quality, no text. Write the most cliche em dash filled AI cliche and show someone crossing this stuff off with a red pen.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
